description_long: This is a reusable coffee cup with a matte, reddish-brown lid and a matching ribbed silicone sleeve for grip and insulation. The main body of the cup is decorated with a whimsical, colorful pattern featuring abstract shapes, gears, and cartoonish faces in shades of orange, white, beige, and brown on a black background. The cup appears to be made primarily of plastic or ceramic, with the sleeve likely made of silicone or rubber for heat protection. The lid is designed to fit snugly, with a small drinking hole visible on one side. The cup is of a size suitable for takeaway beverages, commonly seen in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or on sidewalks.
description: A reusable coffee cup with a reddish-brown lid and ribbed sleeve, featuring a colorful, abstract pattern on a black background. The cup is designed for takeaway drinks and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cup's lid, ribbed sleeve, and the most prominent part of the decorative pattern with gears and cartoon faces.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the drinking hole in the lid and more of the abstract pattern, including heart shapes and additional faces.
description_view_2: The side view displays a different section of the pattern, with more abstract shapes and less focus on faces.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the continuation of the pattern, with gears and abstract motifs, and the ribbed sleeve wrapping around the cup.
